compiled_state.title: Write failing tests for retro-gather.sh archive-on-consume behavior
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Context
Story ce63-4a2a adds a lifecycle policy for .suggestions/ records: after retro synthesis, processed files are archived to .suggestions/archive/, and archive entries older than suggestion.archive_retain_days are pruned. This task writes failing tests BEFORE the implementation exists (RED-first).

Assumes .suggestions/ schema from story 8d1b-0d04 and synthesis interface from story 434c-ca05 are stable.

## What to do
Modify tests/scripts/test-retro-gather.sh to add 4 new test cases (all must FAIL before implementation):

**Test case 1 — archive-on-consume:**
Given: .tickets-tracker/.suggestions/ has 2 JSON suggestion files
When: retro-gather.sh synthesis section runs
Then: each file exists in .tickets-tracker/.suggestions/archive/ AND git -C .tickets-tracker log -1 shows an archive commit message matching "suggestions: archive"

**Test case 2 — retention pruning:**
Given: archive/ contains a file with mtime older than 90 days
When: retro-gather.sh runs
Then: that file no longer exists in archive/ AND git -C .tickets-tracker log -1 shows a prune commit

**Test case 3 — exclusion from re-read:**
Given: archive/ contains previously-archived suggestion files
When: retro-gather.sh synthesis runs again
Then: the synthesis SUGGESTION_DATA output does NOT include content from archived files (only .suggestions/*.json, not archive/)

**Test case 4 — graceful degradation:**
Given: .tickets-tracker/.suggestions/ is empty OR .tickets-tracker/ does not exist
When: retro-gather.sh runs
Then: exits 0 with no output to stderr

## File Impact
| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| tests/scripts/test-retro-gather.sh | modify — add 4 test cases |
| .test-index | modify — additive: append tests/scripts/test-retro-gather.sh to existing mapping for plugins/dso/scripts/retro-gather.sh (comma-separated, do NOT replace test-v2-hooks-cleanup.sh entry) |

## Test Approach (Given/When/Then per test case above)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py 2>/dev/null || true
- [ ] 4 new test cases exist in test-retro-gather.sh
  Verify: grep -c "archive-on-consume\|retention pruning\|exclusion from re-read\|graceful degradation" tests/scripts/test-retro-gather.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] All 4 new test cases FAIL when run without the implementation (behavior does not exist in retro-gather.sh yet)
  Verify: run the 4 new test functions in isolation against current retro-gather.sh and confirm non-zero exit
- [ ] .test-index has additive entry for retro-gather.sh → test-retro-gather.sh
  Verify: grep "retro-gather.sh" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -q "test-retro-gather.sh"

comments.body: AC amendment: Test case 2 (pruning) — use touch -t to set an artificially old mtime on the test archive file (consistent with mtime-based age detection per AC amendment on 30bd-ef7e). Document the touch -t approach in the test setup so the test is reproducible across macOS and Linux.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: AC amendment: Test case 3 (archived files not re-read) — place a unique marker string ('ARCHIVED_MARKER_UNIQUE_XYZ') in an archived suggestion JSON file. Run retro-gather.sh. Assert the marker string does NOT appear in the SUGGESTION_DATA section of the synthesis output. This makes the test independent of exact synthesis format while verifying the behavioral contract.
comments.author: Test
